name_en: BV patti bag Full and three-dimensional padded leather strip, understated luxury is often hidden in details and craftsmanship. This bag has a casual opening, simple and elegant overall design, and comes with a detachable shoulder strap for crossbody or handheld wear to match different outfits. The interior features double-layering and a zippered pocket for secure storage of private items. Whether for capacity, style, or privacy, it offers a full sense of security.
